creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 244553
patch and pet portlinters

Max - I'll roll a patch for the latest h2o and attach it here,
just in case its locally fixed. If not, can you report it
upstream to h2o project please, feel free to @ me I'm dch
there too.

Uwe - have you had any mruby issues from the last update? Also,
try the new patch if you can.
